title: Volatile liquid dispensing system
abstract: Disclosed is a volatile liquid dispensing system that includes a dispenser and a refill unit. The dispenser is mounted on a predefined surface. The dispenser includes a front cover and a rear cover. The refill unit is removably secured inside the dispenser thereby maintaining a predefined gap therebetween. The refill unit includes a refill cover. The refill cover includes a fragrance reservoir and a collection device enclosed therein. The fragrance reservoir is formed by a gas shell and a fragrance shell. The fragrance reservoir is positioned in a predefined orientation with respect to the mounting surface. The collection device is positioned adjacent to the fragrance reservoir such that a predefined gap is maintained therebetween. The collection device is enclosed in the refill cover such that a predefined gap is maintained therebetween thereby allowing evaporation of the volatile liquid from all sides of the collection device.
claims: Claims C laims : 1. A volatile liquid dispensing system (300) comprising: a dispenser (100) mounted on a predefined surface, the dispenser having a front cover (40) and a rear cover (80), the front cover secured on the rear cover; and a refill unit (200) removably secured inside the dispenser (100) thereby maintaining a predefined gap therebetween, the refill unit (200) having a refill cover (150), the refill cover (150) having a fragrance reservoir (130) and a collection device (140) enclosed therein, the collection device (140) positioned adjacent to the fragrance reservoir (130) for collecting and emanati ng pumped vol ati I e I i qui d from the fragrance reservoi r ( 130) i nto an atmosphere, characterized in that, the fragrance reservoir (130) positioning in a predefined orientation with respect to the predefined surface, the col I ecti on devi ce ( 140) posi ti oni ng adj acent to the fragrance reservoi r ( 130) thereby maintaining a predefined gap therebetween, the fragrance reservoir (130) delivering the volatile liquid to the collection device (140) through a predefined discharging mode, the col I ecti on devi ce ( 140) end osi ng i n the ref i 11 cover ( 150) thereby mai ntai ni ng a predef i ned gap therebetween al I owi ng evaporati on of the vol ati I e I i qui d from al I si des of the collection device (150). 2. The volatile liquid dispensing system (300) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the collection device (140) is arranged in such a way that allows exposure of all sides of the collection device (140) to air thereby allowing increased evaporation of the volatile liquid from i nsi de and outsi de surfaces of the col I ecti on devi ce ( 140) . 3. The volatile liquid dispensing system (300) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the discharging mode is gas. 4. The volatile liquid dispensing system (300) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the discharging mode is gravity. 5. The volatile liquid dispensing system (300) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the predefined surface is any one of a mounting surface and a horizontal flat surface. 6. The volatile liquid dispensing system (300) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the fragrance reservoir (130) is positioned in a parallel orientation with respect to the predefined surface. 7. The volatile liquid dispensing system (300) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the fragrance reservoir (130) is positioned in a perpendicular orientation with respect to the predefined surface. 8. The volatile liquid dispensing system (300) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the predefined gap between the collection device (140) and the fragrance reservoir (130) is minimum of 5mm. 9. The volatile liquid dispensing system (300) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the predefined gap between the collection device (140) and the refill unit (200) is minimum of 2mm. 10. The volatile liquid dispensing system (300) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the refill unit (200) is secured inside the dispenser (100) using at least one O-ring (114) and/or at least one flat seal (116). 11. A volatile liquid dispensing system (300) comprising a refill unit (200), the refill unit (200) having a refill cover (150), the refill cover (150) having a fragrance reservoir (130) and a collection device (140) enclosed therein, the collection device (140) positioned adjacent to the fragrance reservoir (130) for collecting and emanating pumped volatile liquid from the fragrance reservoir (130) into an atmosphere, characterized in that, the fragrance reservoir (130) positioning in a predefined orientation with respect to a predefined surface, the col I ecti on devi ce ( 140) posi ti oni ng adj acent to the fragrance reservoi r ( 130) thereby maintaining a predefined gap therebetween, the fragrance reservoir (130) delivering the volatile liquid to the collection device (140) through a predefined discharging mode, the col I ecti on devi ce ( 140) end osi ng i n the ref i 11 cover ( 150) thereby mai ntai ni ng a predef i ned gap therebetween al I owi ng evaporati on of the volati I e I i qui d from al I si des of the collection device (150). 12. The volatile liquid dispensing system (300) as claimed in claim 11, wherein the collection device (140) is arranged in such a way that allows exposure of all sides of the collection device (140) to air thereby allowing increased evaporation of the volatile liquid from i nsi de and outsi de surfaces of the col I ecti on devi ce ( 140) . 13. The volatile liquid dispensing system (300) as claimed in claim 11, wherein the discharging mode is gas. 14. The volatile liquid dispensing system (300) as claimed in claim 11, wherein the discharging mode is gravity.
